news.headline: OpenAI robotics chief quits over AI’s potential use for war and surveillance
news.summary: A top robotics executive at OpenAI said Saturday she had resigned over the company’s deal with the US Department of Defence to allow its artificial intelligence to be used for war and potential domestic surveillance.

news.headline: Boom times for India’s economy but opportunities remain uneven
news.summary:
For years India’s economy was driven by its vast services sector that saw millions of people working away in low-cost back offices providing consultancy for predominantly Western companies.
But over the past decade they have given way to centres that allow firms to tap top-tier talent and technology

news.headline: Israel strikes busy Beirut hotel in assassination attempt
news.summary: Israel has claimed responsibility for an assassination attempt, which killed at least four people, at a Beirut hotel.

news.headline: Rapper-turned-politician Balen Shah’s RSP heads for poll landslide in Nepal
news.summary: Shah's party represents a reformist wave reshaping the Himalayan nation's politics since last year’s youth-led uprising.

news.headline: In Russia’s Former Capital, Restoring the Past to Survive the Present
news.summary: With political activism off-limits, residents of St. Petersburg are finding purpose and community in the “politics of small deeds,” repairing and cleaning architectural treasures.
